## Property Descriptions

<a id="class-librebox-trackselection-property-tracks-holder"></a>

`Container` **Tracks_Holder** = `<unknown>` [🔗](#class-librebox-trackselection-property-tracks-holder)

Track library selection panel for one deck. Builds track cards, handles hover scrolling, and routes selection/removal actions.
